title: Clawcraft Spin
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Claw|more=Spin}}
The '''Clawcraft Spin''' was an evasive [[Starfighter combat/Legends|combat]] tactic that was utilized by [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]]. The pilot of a [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|clawcraft]] would throw his or her craft into a wild, erratic spin that was centered around the ball [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]], constantly firing and moving unpredictably. It was popular among clawcraft pilots for use in [[Realspace/Legends|space]], but was considered incredibly dangerous to use within an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. During the [[Battle of Tenupe]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jagged Fel]], flying on one engine and with no shields, successfully used the Clawcraft Spin while in atmosphere to evade fire from [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Zekk]] [[Joiner]]s.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''
